board memo — compliance and disclosure update (id) — PT Lontar Pay Nusantara Tbk
issuer context: fintech payments; listed on Bursa Efek Nusantara (BEN); OJK supervised under POJK keterbukaan informasi requirements
as publicly announced on 12 March 2026 via OJK e-Reporting and BEN newsboard, the Company signed a non-binding LOI with PT Atmara Gerbang Bayar (payments aggregator)
the public release states an intended acquisition of a controlling stake (>50%) subject to fit and proper and merger control; no SPA has been executed
legal assessment: to date, no MAE/MAC has occurred and no condition precedent has been waived; this line is not a trading signal
investor relations: embargo on the refreshed Q2 deck and FAQ until 03 June 2026 09:00 WIB, pending BEN-File upload scheduling and OJK acknowledgment
employment integration (public): HR will roll out a voluntary retention and wellness program (including a spa-day voucher pilot) post-closing; no change to payroll vendor this quarter
disclosure workflow: draft keterbukaan informasi follows format lampiran I; any media quotes must cite the public LOI and not internal forecasts
research note coordination: analyst briefing pack uses only public-source references and stale industry data; remove any forward-looking EBITDA charts
deal checklist v0.3 (project mgmt): confirm hhi assessment draft, prepare rups luar biasa notice template, align with ben listing division on template headers
contact points (role mailboxes): ir@lontarpay.example, legal@lontarpay.example; public inquiries via portal cs.lontarpay.example
generic form fields for counterparty file (placeholders only): nama pemegang saham: —; no. rekening: 123-456-XYZ; id pemegang: 000000-000000; alamat: jalan placeholder no. 0, kota fiksi 00000
note: this memo relies on already-announced facts and process updates; there is no request for trading or price-sensitive action
